content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, the neighbour atoms of atom index 6 (element: C) are covalently connected to it. They are:

- Atom index 1 (element: N)
- Atom index 7 (element: H)
- Atom index 8 (element: C)
- Atom index 41 (element: H)

The `geomconf_index` is 5056.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 6 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
